message:
feat(tests): add 24 new tests for trace recorder module (bd-1kv3k)

Cover snapshot, io_ready bitflag combinations, chaos injection variants
(delay without task, io_error_injection), waker events when enabled,
config builder methods, LimitAction Debug, LimitKind equality,
max_memory with DropOldest, callback returning DropOldest, estimated
size after take, stopped recorder behavior, and default config values.

Coverage: 17 → 41 tests for src/trace/recorder.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
